header.title: Cất Cánh (Takeoff) Fellowship
header.subtitle: The launch pad for Viet talent
header.founder: Founded by Dr. Loi Nguyen (Exec VP Emeritus, Marvell) & VISEMI Foundation

gaps.body: A massive global shortage of technical professionals in high-level semiconductors and advanced tech.
With limited local MS and PhD opportunities, fully funded programs in regions like the USA or Taiwan offer the strongest paths for talented STEM students.
Surveys and interviews reveal that STEM talent faces financial, language, and strategic roadblocks limiting their access to overseas education.

bridge.body: Structured English training and application coaching.
Up to $15K per student via a tiered financial support system, covering basic needs, qualified exams, application fees, conferences.
Pair with VISEMI ambassadors & worldwide experts.
Every fellow commits to mentoring the next cohort, ensuring sustainable growth.

roi.headline: 7x to 20x ROI
roi.body: A ~$10K Prep Grant can unlock fully-funded scholarships worth ~$70K (MS) to ~$200K (PhD).

stats.label: Fellows Funded
stats.body: Achieve 80%+ admission success rate with a funding of $150K for grants & operations.

stats.label: Fellows Funded
stats.body: Escalate to a global Viet tech talent network with a budget under $2M.

impacts.qr_caption: Scan the QR code to fill out our Partner Interest Form and connect with our founding team.
